passives.name: End the Line
passives.effects: At the start of the combat phase in each round, declare the enemy champion with the lowest {{as|'''total maximum''' health}} as the ''Regent''. Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against the ''Regent'' for the first time in the combat phase grants you {{as|10 '''bonus''' attack damage}} permanently and sets the '''current''' cooldown of your ultimate ability to {{fd|0.5}} seconds.

effects_structured.raw: At the start of each combat phase, mark the enemy champion with the lowest max health as the Regent.
First takedown of the Regent in the combat phase grants 10 permanent bonus attack damage and sets current ultimate cooldown to 0.5 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: at each Arena combat-phase start, Regicide designates the enemy with the lowest total maximum health as Regent for that phase.
Player-visible behavior: only the first takedown on the designated Regent in that combat phase grants permanent bonus attack damage and forces ultimate current cooldown to 0.5 seconds.
